description: US-Israel-Iran military conflict escalated on 2026-02-28, resulting in the effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz — the chokepoint for ~20% of global oil and ~25% of global LNG transit. VLCC tanker traffic rerouted to Cape of Good Hope routes, extending voyage times by ~14 days and tightening global tanker capacity. Crude oil ETFs surged ~96% on the disruption. Energy companies with Middle East exposure repriced sharply.
user_notes: Detectado con retraso (2026-06-04, evento ocurrido 2026-02-28). is_priced_in_estimate: 1.0 — BWET ya +1.406%, energy ETFs ya +96%. No hay entrada disponible. Registrado para documentación histórica y para calibrar la velocidad del pipeline de detección. El cierre de Ormuz sigue activo — si se reabre, este catalyst pasa a status: invalidated.
